mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, active_score, favorite_categories, grade, interests, majors, overdue_rate, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{activeScore}, #{favoriteCategories}, #{grade}, #{interests}, #{majors}, #{overdueRate}, NOW(6)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE active_score = VALUES(active_score), favorite_categories = VALUES(favorite_categories), grade = VALUES(grade), interests = VALUES(interests), majors = VALUES(majors), overdue_rate = VALUES(overdue_rate), updated_at = NOW(6)
